summary: Frontend testing of Hero Premium Enhancements on HomePage. All 13 features tested and passed. Hero section displays correctly with premium halo (radial gradient #0097b2 -> #7ed957), 4 floating icons with animations, premium 'Rejoins maintenant' card, and responsive mobile layout showing 2 icons.
passed_tests: Hero title with gradient text 'simplifie' visible
Hero WhatsApp CTA button 'Rejoindre le WhatsApp' found and visible
3 badges displayed: +6000 étudiants, Communauté modérée, 100% gratuit
Premium halo (.hero-premium-halo) exists with radial gradient and blur(40px) filter
Halo gradient contains correct colors: #0097b2 (rgb 0,151,178) and #7ed957 (rgb 126,217,87)
4 floating icons with correct labels: Logements, Dons, Offres, Modération
All icons have float animation classes: float-slow, float-medium, float-fast, float-medium
Animation keyframes defined: floatSlow, floatMedium, floatFast
Premium card with 'Rejoins maintenant', 'C'est 100% gratuit', 'Réponse rapide via WhatsApp' visible
Hero main image visible with rounded corners and shadow
Hover effects CSS: transform scale(1.05) + box-shadow with rgba(0,151,178,0.15)
Mobile responsive: 2 icons (Logements, Dons) displayed under content
Mobile: Desktop floating icons hidden (display: none)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero premium enhancements fully working. Key CSS classes: .hero-premium-halo (radial gradient blur effect), .hero-floating-icon (card style with hover zoom), .hero-floating-icons-desktop (desktop container), .hero-floating-icons-mobile (mobile container shows 2 icons). Animations: floatSlow (5s), floatMedium (4s), floatFast (3.5s). Premium card at position: left -32px, bottom 64px. Gradient colors used: #0097b2 -> #7ed957 for halo and accents.

tested_features.cta_buttons: PASS - WhatsApp and Publier annonce buttons
tested_features.floating_icons_desktop: PASS - 4 icons: Logements, Dons, Offres, Modération
tested_features.premium_card: PASS - 'Rejoins maintenant' with 'C'est 100% gratuit' and 'Réponse rapide via WhatsApp'
tested_features.hero_image: PASS - Main image visible with shadow
tested_features.mobile_responsive_2_icons: PASS - Logements, Dons displayed on mobile
